nasb.text: Every beast, every creeping thing, and every bird, everything that moves on the earth, went out by their families from the ark.

esv.text: Every beast, every creeping thing, and every bird, everything that moves on the earth, went out by families from the ark.

cnv.text: 各樣走獸、牲畜、飛禽和各樣在地上爬行的動物，各從自己的族類，都出了方舟。

ccb.text: 方舟里的飞禽走兽和爬虫等所有地上的动物，都按种类出了方舟。

csbs.text: 各样野兽、爬行之物和飞鸟，所有地上的动物，都按着它们的种类，也从方舟出来了。
